ABOUT ME

Get to know more about

who i am.

A little about me

Nice to meet you. I'm Peshal Mishra

I transform complex ideas into high-speed, scalable web products. As an engineering-driven developer, I focus on the entire stack — prioritizing clean architecture, seamless performance, and modern solutions that drive real value.

Beyond writing code, I understand the product lifecycle. From architecting initial cloud infrastructure to deploying robust microservices, I've learned firsthand how to build, ship, and scale meaningful applications in a fast-paced environment.

My philosophy is simple: build things that last. I help startups and businesses bridge the gap between concept and reality with code that performs.

LinkedInGitHubTwitter

The Experience

Experience That
Brings Ideas to Life

JAN 2024 – PRESENT

Freelance

Remote — Worldwide
Self-employed

Full Stack & Cloud Engineer

Designed and delivered end-to-end web applications for clients across startups and SMBs, handling everything from system architecture to final deployment on cloud infrastructure.

Built and shipped production-grade REST APIs and microservices using Node.js, Spring Boot, and Go — serving thousands of daily active users with 99.9% uptime.

Architected and managed AWS infrastructure (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS) with Terraform, reducing client cloud costs by an average of 30% through right-sizing and automation.

Delivered responsive, performant frontends using Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS — consistently scoring 90+ on Lighthouse performance audits.

Containerised and deployed applications with Docker and Kubernetes, implementing CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions for zero-downtime releases.

Maintained direct client relationships — translating business requirements into technical specs, providing weekly progress updates, and iterating rapidly on feedback.

Next.jsNode.jsSpring BootGoAWSDockerKubernetesTerraformPostgreSQLRedisTailwind CSSGitHub Actions

2023 – 2024

Self-directed Learning

Remote
Personal Development

Cloud & DevOps Practice

Worked on learning and implementing cloud technologies using Amazon Web Services, building hands-on experience with real infrastructure from the ground up.

Practiced deploying applications and managing virtual machines on AWS, gaining a solid understanding of cloud infrastructure concepts including virtualization, scalability, and high availability.

Explored containerization using Docker — building, tagging, and running containers, managing images, and understanding how containers compare to traditional VMs.

Set up and experimented with basic CI/CD workflows, automating build and deployment pipelines to understand how modern software delivery works end-to-end.

AWSEC2S3DockerCI/CDGitHub ActionsLinuxNetworkingVirtualization

Building digital experiences that matter, one line of code at a time. Crafting interfaces that feel alive, solving problems that make a difference, and turning ideas into reality. Every pixel has a purpose.
